description.value: Aura faint enchantment; CL 1st; Slot belt; Price 3,000 gp; Weight 1/2 lb. DESCRIPTION This silk scarf is embroidered with all the colors of a flame and tasseled in tiny beads. When wrapped around the hips, it grants the wearer a +5 competence bonus on Perform (dance) checks. In addition, the scarf adds +1 to the saving throw DC of the wearer’s fascinate and suggestion bardic performances. CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Feats Craft Wondrous Item, hypnotism; Cost 950 gp
